top_signals.title: Roadmap for collaboration UK-Spain
top_signals.summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves and First Vice-President and Minister of Economy, Trade and Business Carlos Cuerpo Caballero have signed a roadmap on UK-Spain collaboration in Brussels on 9 July 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A decade after historic ruling, Philippine fishermen say little changed at key shoal
top_signals.summary: Today, local fishermen have become too afraid to venture out to Scarborough Shoal and its prized fishing waters for fear of harassment by Chinese vessels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
top_signals.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
